Operation 'getNobelPrize' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks specificity about what 'details' are returned and the response schema structure. Enhanced description specifies the response object type and includes relevant fields to help AI agents understand the complete output.

data.current_description: Returns details of a specific Nobel Prize by category and year.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific Nobel Prize identified by category and year. Returns a NobelPrizeDetail object containing prize information, laureates, and related metadata for the specified category and year combination.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks specificity about what 'details' are returned and the response schema structure. Enhanced description specifies the response object type and includes relevant fields to help AI agents understand the complete output.

message: Operation 'getLaureate' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is vague about what 'detailed information' includes and lacks response schema context. Enhanced description specifies the LaureateDetail response object and lists key information categories (biographical data, affiliations, prizes) to improve AI agent understanding of available data.

data.current_description: Returns detailed information about a specific Nobel Prize laureate by ID.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive biographical and prize information for a specific Nobel Prize laureate identified by laureateID. Returns a LaureateDetail object containing personal information, birth/death details, affiliations, and all associated Nobel Prize awards.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is vague about what 'detailed information' includes and lacks response schema context. Enhanced description specifies the LaureateDetail response object and lists key information categories (biographical data, affiliations, prizes) to improve AI agent understanding of available data.

Operation 'getNobelPrize' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks specificity about what details are returned and the required parameters. Enhanced description specifies the response schema type, explains the composite key (category + year), and clarifies what information is included, improving AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns details of a specific Nobel Prize by category and year.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive details for a specific Nobel Prize identified by category and year. Returns a NobelPrizeDetail object containing prize information, associated laureates, and related metadata. This operation requires both category and year parameters to uniquely identify the prize.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description lacks specificity about what details are returned and the required parameters. Enhanced description specifies the response schema type, explains the composite key (category + year), and clarifies what information is included, improving AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getLaureate' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too generic and lacks specificity about response content and the laureate's Nobel Prize context. Enhanced description specifies the response schema type (LaureateDetail), clarifies the unique identifier parameter, explains what biographical and achievement data is included, and positions this as the detailed laureate endpoint, enabling AI agents to distinguish it from list operations and understand its comprehensive nature.

data.current_description: Returns detailed information about a specific Nobel Prize laureate by ID.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive biographical and achievement details for a specific Nobel Prize laureate identified by their unique laureateID. Returns a LaureateDetail object containing personal information, Nobel Prize history, affiliations, and related links. This operation provides the most detailed laureate information available in the API.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is too generic and lacks specificity about response content and the laureate's Nobel Prize context. Enhanced description specifies the response schema type (LaureateDetail), clarifies the unique identifier parameter, explains what biographical and achievement data is included, and positions this as the detailed laureate endpoint, enabling AI agents to distinguish it from list operations and understand its comprehensive nature.
